title: Junior SEO Specialist at OYO Rooms

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at OYO Rooms
jsonLd.description:
OYO Rooms invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About OYO Rooms:
OYO Rooms is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OYO Rooms!
